MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PETER HWANG, DIANA HWANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY REQUEST'S; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE WRITTEN, VERIFIED ANSWERS (WITHOUT OBJECTION OTHER THAN PRIVILEGE) TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AT ISSUE AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL NON-PRIVILEGED RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THE HEARING OF THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $434.26, WHICH PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE HEARING OF THIS MATTER. ORDER SIGNED. ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Deft'S Discovery Req.'S; Req. For Sanctions And Pos
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jonathan H. Erb, Philip M. Andersen & Associates, 925.225.6838, appearing for Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: DEFENDANT PETER HWANG, DIANA HWANG'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendant's Discovery Request's; Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve written, verified answers (without objection other than privilege) to the form interrogatories and requests for production at issue and shall produce all non-privileged responsive documents within 10 days from the date of the hearing of this matter. Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $434.26, which Plaintiff shall pay within 30 days of the date of the hearing of this matter. Order signed. Anthony Schoenberg, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
